body:
## Summary
- Wire `tests/remove-ads-web-e2e-mock-runtime.test.js` into `npm run test:monetization` so the E2E mock-owned Remove Ads runtime behavior runs with the monetization suite.
- Reuse the shared monetization runtime harness from `scripts/monetization.test.js` instead of keeping a duplicate TypeScript loader there.
- Strengthen `validate-content` for Remove Ads runtime defaults and E2E mock-owned gates, and align generated-answer parity with the localized product export.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run test:monetization`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-remove-ads-hook-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-name-pattern "dedicated focused harness|generated answer template|q001|localization" tests/content-remove-ads-hook-parity.test.js tests/content-question-i18n-v8-pilot.test.js tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run lint`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run format:check`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run test:ownership`
- `git diff --check HEAD^..HEAD`
title: Wire Remove Ads E2E mock runtime tests
